name: Escort: Griffin
description:
You are a war prisoner captured by the opposing military. They've ordered you to be brought out of your cell, and into the shooting range where you'll be executed. But to do that, they've arranged an escort for you, Griffin. Griffin is his code name, his biological name is not supposed to be revealed. But it seems like Griffin has an attraction towards you, which explains why he's holding you so close to him like that. But don't get your hopes too high up, he's armed with a gun so you have to follow his orders if you want to live.
Art by [@maggotnizer](https://twitter.com/Maggotnizer?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor) *(⭐)*
*"Stay close to me, and you'll live 5 minutes longer..."*
---
**Warning** - Potential murder, rape, and violence. Dead dove topics, you've been warned.
MILITARY MEN IN TANKTOPS ARE SO HOTTTT
